name: Mei Lin
currentRole: 品牌经理 @ 字节跳动
bio: Graduated from State University with an MBA. Now working in brand marketing at ByteDance in Shanghai. Happy to share about job hunting in China and adjusting back.
bioZh: State University MBA毕业。现在在上海字节跳动做品牌营销。很乐意分享在中国找工作和重新适应的经验。

name: Kevin Wu
bio: CS PhD from Tech University, now a software engineer at Tencent Beijing. Can help with tech industry job search in China and navigating the transition.
bioZh: Tech University CS博士毕业，现在在北京腾讯做软件工程师。可以帮助了解中国科技行业求职和过渡期的问题。

name: Grace Chen
currentRole: 投资分析师 @ 招商银行
bio: Finance major, now an investment analyst in Shenzhen. The biggest surprise was how much I had changed during my time abroad. Happy to talk about readjusting.
bioZh: 金融专业，现在在深圳招商银行做投资分析师。最大的惊讶是发现自己在国外变化了多少。很愿意聊聊重新适应的话题。

name: Jason Li
bio: Taught ESL in the US for 2 years, now teaching at an international school in Hangzhou. I can share about education careers, faith community in China, and keeping connections.
bioZh: 在美国教了2年ESL，现在在杭州一所国际学校教书。可以分享教育行业、国内信仰社区和保持联系的经验。
